personal.name: Dimitrios Stergiou
personal.title: CISO
personal.bio: CISO with 25+ years building security programs across fintech and payments. Board-reporting executive owning $2M+ budgets and security programs spanning 50+ countries. No material incidents under leadership, 72+ audits passed, 4 frameworks shipped on schedule. I build security programs that survive audits and enable business growth.

highlights: Quarterly Board briefings and Audit Committee reporting as CISO and Group CISO at fintech and listed companies
Accountable for $2M+ annual security, IT, and technology vendor spend
Functional accountability across security, risk, compliance, corporate IT, and resilience
Security and Corporate IT programs spanning 50+ countries
Regulatory engagement across DORA, PSD2, PCI DSS, ISO 27001, NESA, and gaming jurisdictions (UKGC, AAMS, MGA, AGCC, CCC)
No material incidents under leadership; 72+ regulatory audits passed; 4 frameworks shipped (SOC 2, ISO 27001, PCI DSS, DORA) on schedule

experience.companyContext: International money transfer fintech operating in 50+ countries
achievements: Direct report to COO, providing quarterly Board briefings on cyber risk, compliance, and security strategy
Achieved SOC 2, PCI DSS, ISO 27001, and DORA compliance — unlocking business customer segment and enabling regulatory expansion — all on time, zero audit observations

Accountable for $2M+ annual security, IT, and technology vendor spend across 20+ strategic suppliers — EDR, identity (Okta), GRC (Vanta), application security (Snyk), and enterprise AI (Claude, OpenAI)
Built and led Corporate IT and Security function from scratch for 300+ employees and 600+ contractors across 50+ countries — 98+ NPS with a 2-person team
Delivered commercial outcomes through security — faster enterprise customer reviews, new market entry, and compliance-gated product launches
Reduced cyber insurance premiums by 20% through robust security controls and zero-breach record
Built third-party risk program from scratch — 130+ vendor assessments, DPAs, and ongoing monitoring
Supported enterprise sales through security due diligence — customer questionnaires, audit responses, trust documentation
Established AI security and governance program for enterprise LLM use (Claude, OpenAI) — data classification, acceptable use, tooling oversight
experience.keyDomains: Security Strategy · Corporate IT · Risk Management · Incident Response · DevSecOps · BCP/DR · Compliance (SOC 2, PCI DSS, ISO 27001, DORA, GDPR) · Vendor Risk · AI Governance

Ensure compliance with information security and privacy regulations (DORA, GDPR, PCI DSS, SOC 2, ISO 27001)
Manage third-party vendor relationships for IT and security services
